name: Monaco
notes: Official marketing pages identify Monaco as an AI-native revenue platform for startups.
Monaco security policy lists api.monaco.com as a public API, but no public developer reference, auth model, endpoint list, OpenAPI spec, CLI, SDK, or MCP docs were found.
reviewReason: Public API host is listed at api.monaco.com, but no public API/MCP/CLI/SDK documentation, auth details, endpoints, rate limits, or pagination were found.
